case_title: SONIA AREVALO VS. RUTH NOHEMY GUSTO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED JUN-15-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTO HERNANDEZ, RUTH NOHEMY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-01-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THE CASE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY $500.00 TWICE A MONTH FOR THREE MONTHS: AUG-15-17, AUG-30-17, SEP-15-17, SEP-30-17, OCT-15-17 AND OCT-30-17 UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED FOR THREE MONTH FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE. PLAINTIFF SONIA AREVALO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUTH NOHEMY GUSTO HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES WERE ASSITIED BY NINA SADFIE, CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AREVALO, SONIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUSTO HERNANDEZ, RUTH NOHEMY $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY AREVALO, SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTO HERNANDEZ, RUTH NOHEMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTO HERNANDEZ, RUTH NOHEMY HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE. PLAINTIFF SONIA AREVALO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUTH NOHEMY GUSTO HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SONIA AREVALO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUTH NOHEMY GUSTO HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT.
ORDER NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO RUTH HOMEMY GUSTO HERNANDEZ 471 PARIS STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94112
